name: Feathery Fudge Cake with Hungarian Frosting
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 ounces unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt.
2. Cream butter or margarine in a large bowl of an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add sugar to the butter mixture; beat until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Blend in melted chocolate.
6. Add sifted dry ingredients alternately with ice water. Mix until combined.
7. Add vanilla extract.
8. Pour batter into two greased and floured 9-inch layer cake pans.
9. Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 30 to 35 minutes.
10. Frost the cooled cakes with Hungarian Frosting.
Hungarian Frosting:
1. Combine chocolate, confectioners' sugar, and hot water in a small bowl of an electric mixer; blend until smooth.
2. Add egg to the mixture and beat well.
3. Gradually add butter or margarine, one tablespoon at a time, beating until smooth.
This cake and frosting can be frozen for later use.
